mission:
Implement tool call tracking for swarm agents.

Read the full spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03

tasks.title: Final close-out verification of human directives

discoveries: [db-impl] (report) Completed: Added tool_calls table (with 3 indexes) and mcp_status table to SCHEMA_SQL. Added 5 methods to Database class: record_tool_call, get_tool_usage (with run_id/agent_id filters), get_tool_failure_summary (grouped by tool_name), record_mcp_status, get_mcp_status. All 3100 tests pass, ruff clean.

[controller-impl] (report) Implemented stream-json parsing and tool call tracking: added _agent_tool_calls/_agent_final_results instance vars, _parse_stream_event method, rewrote _stream_agent_output, switched to output_format=stream-json, updated monitor_agents output extraction. All 3100 tests pass, ruff clean, bandit clean.

[context-cli-careful] (report) Diagnosis: Spec items 5 (context.py) and 6 (cli.py) are ALREADY FULLY IMPLEMENTED. context.py has _render_tool_failures and _render_mcp_status wired into render_for_planner (lines 471-477, 494-515). cli.py has tool-usage subcommand with --run-id, --failures-only, --top flags (lines 201-206, 1439-1492). db.py has all 5 methods (record_tool_call, get_tool_usage, get_tool_failure_summary, record_mcp_status, get_mcp_status). All 15 tool_tracking tests pass. Full suite: 3115 pass, 1 skipped. Lint 100% clean. Previous 3 agent failures were likely before db-impl and test-writer completed their work. No changes needed.

[final-verifier] (report) Final verification PASSED. 3115 tests passed (1 skipped), ruff lint 100% clean. Tool tracking tests: 15/15 passed (test_tool_tracking.py). All implementation correct, no regressions.
[final-close-verifier] (report) Tool-call-tracking mission CLOSED. Full suite: 3115 passed (1 skipped), ruff lint 100% clean, 15/15 tool_tracking tests passed. No regressions.

[final-verify] (report) VERIFICATION PASSED. (1) pytest test_tool_tracking.py: 15/15 passed. (2) Full suite: 3115 passed, 1 skipped. (3) ruff: All checks passed. (4) bandit: clean. All 7 spec items confirmed present and correct.

[verify-clean-state] (report) VERIFICATION PASSED. (1) test_tool_tracking.py: 15/15 passed. (2) Full suite: 3115 passed, 1 skipped. (3) ruff: clean. (4) bandit: clean. All 7 spec areas confirmed in code: db.py tables+methods, controller.py stream-json parsing+_parse_stream_event+_agent_tool_calls+_agent_final_results, context.py _render_tool_failures+_render_mcp_status wired into render_for_planner, cli.py tool-usage subcommand, tests 15/15. No changes made.

[human] (directive) Clean up the autodev codebase. Fix P3 and P4 issues from the system audit: (1) Delete dead code: checkpoint.py and adaptive_concurrency.py are orphaned from production, safe to delete along with their tests. (2) Delete backends/entire.py skeleton and all EntireConfig plumbing -- it is NotImplementedError stubs with zero functionality. (3) Deduplicate _extract_json_array in intelligence/llm_evaluator.py -- use json_utils.extract_json_from_text instead. (4) Update test_controller_auth.py to import AuthHandler instead of HeadlessAuthHandler alias. (5) Make build_claude_cmd use find_claude_binary() from intelligence/utils.py instead of hardcoding claude. (6) Fix any other bugs, inconsistencies, or dead code you find. All existing tests must pass after changes. Run pytest + ruff + bandit before committing.

[dead-code-cleaner] (report) Deleted 4 orphaned files: src/autodev/checkpoint.py, src/autodev/adaptive_concurrency.py, tests/test_checkpoint.py, tests/test_adaptive_concurrency.py. No imports or references existed outside these files and their tests. Verification: 3042 tests pass (1 skipped), ruff clean, bandit clean.

[small-fixes] (report) Completed both fixes: (1) Deduplicated _extract_json_array in llm_evaluator.py -- now delegates to extract_json_from_text(text, expect_array=True) from json_utils.py, keeping thin wrapper for ValueError on failure. (2) Updated test_controller_auth.py -- replaced 4 occurrences of HeadlessAuthHandler patch string with AuthHandler. Full suite: 3042 passed (1 skipped), ruff clean, bandit clean.
